sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, score INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, score) VALUES (1, 100), (2, NULL), (3, 90);
SELECT regr_count(score, id) AS non_null_pairs FROM test_data;
UPDATE test_data SET score = 95 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT regr_count(score, id) AS updated_non_null_pairs FROM test_data;
